If you want to leave Kenfinly temporaril: If you want to leave Kenfinly temporarily, simply deactivate your account. If you choose to delete your account instead, you won't be able to recover it after 30 days.
No one can see your account, including a: No one can see your account, including all content that is stored in it. Reactivate your account and recover all content anytime.
Your account and content will be deleted: Your account and content will be deleted permanently. You may cancel the deletion request by reactivating your account within 30 days.
Have a question or need support? We're h: Have a question or need support? We're happy to help. Reach out through any channel below.
How do I create my first account?: How do I create my first account?
After signing up, go to Settings → Walle: After signing up, go to Settings → Wallets & Accounts and tap "Add Account". Enter a name, choose a currency, and set an opening balance. Your new account will appear on the Home dashboard instantly.
How do I add my first transaction?: How do I add my first transaction?
Tap the "+" button on the Home screen. Choose the type (Expense or Income), select a category, enter the amount, pick the date, and optionally attach a photo receipt. Tap Save to confirm.
Can I import transactions from a CSV fil: Can I import transactions from a CSV file?
Yes. Go to Settings → Data & Privacy and: Yes. Go to Settings → Data & Privacy and use the CSV Import option. Download the sample template, fill it with your transaction data, then upload the file. Kenfinly validates each row before importing and shows a detailed error report for any issues.
Can I manage multiple accounts and curre: Can I manage multiple accounts and currencies?
Absolutely. Kenfinly supports unlimited: Absolutely. Kenfinly supports unlimited accounts in different currencies (USD, VND, EUR, and more). Each account is tracked independently, and the Home dashboard can display totals converted to your preferred currency.
How do I set a spending budget?: How do I set a spending budget?
Navigate to the Budget section from the: Navigate to the Budget section from the Home screen. Tap "Add Budget", choose a category (e.g., Food, Transport), set the monthly limit, and optionally enable smart notifications when you reach 80% of your limit.
How do I invite someone to share an acco: How do I invite someone to share an account?
Open the account from Wallets & Accounts: Open the account from Wallets & Accounts, tap "Participants", then "Invite". Enter the person's email address. They will receive an invitation link and can join with an owner, editor, or viewer role.
Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (T: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Authentication uses JWT tokens with short expiry windows. You can also enable PIN or biometric login for an extra layer of protection on your device.
How do I reset my PIN or password?: How do I reset my PIN or password?
For password reset, tap \"Forgot Passwor: For password reset, tap "Forgot Password?" on the Sign In screen and follow the email link. For PIN reset, go to Settings → Security and choose "Change PIN". You'll need to confirm your current password first.
What data is collected and how is it use: What data is collected and how is it used?
Kenfinly collects only the data you ente: Kenfinly collects only the data you enter (transactions, account names, categories). We do not sell your data to third parties. You can download or delete all your data at any time from Settings → Data & Privacy.
What payment methods does Kenfinly suppo: What payment methods does Kenfinly support?
Kenfinly supports credit/debit cards and: Kenfinly supports credit/debit cards and PayPal for subscription payments. Payment information is processed securely and never stored on our servers — we use a PCI-compliant payment processor.
How do I cancel or change my subscriptio: How do I cancel or change my subscription plan?
Go to Settings → Subscriptions. Tap \"Ma: Go to Settings → Subscriptions. Tap "Manage Plan" to upgrade, downgrade, or cancel. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period and your data remains accessible until then.
Kenfinly accesses only the financial dat: Kenfinly accesses only the financial data you enter — transactions, account names, categories, and budget limits. We never access contacts, messages, or any data outside the app.
Your search queries within the app stay: Your search queries within the app stay on your device. They are never uploaded to our servers or used to build advertising profiles.
Contacts or collaborators you block are: Contacts or collaborators you block are immediately removed from shared account views. They lose all access to accounts you manage.
Export a full copy of your transactions: Export a full copy of your transactions and settings as CSV or JSON
Edit or remove any personal information: Edit or remove any personal information stored in your profile
Permanently remove all data associated w: Permanently remove all data associated with your Kenfinly account
Kenfinly does not sell, rent, or share y: Kenfinly does not sell, rent, or share your financial data with advertisers or data brokers — ever.
All data in transit is protected by TLS: All data in transit is protected by TLS 1.3. Data at rest is encrypted using AES-256. JWT tokens expire within 60 minutes and are rotated on every login.
Your data is retained for as long as you: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. After account deletion, all data is permanently purged within 30 days in compliance with applicable privacy regulations.
